mechanism_narrative: Quarterly growth in real GDP expands corporate earnings expectations, directly lifting equity valuations over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in growth periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating federal funds rate hikes increase discount rates and compress equity multiples, yielding negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive when rate hikes exceed the 0.25pp threshold over consecutive months.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous rises in the unemployment rate and decelerating payroll growth signal labor market deterioration, triggering equity risk-off positioning within one month.
failure_condition: SPX returns are positive when both indicators deteriorate simultaneously over a 20-day window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production exceeding its long-term trend indicates supply chain normalization, boosting profit margins and driving short-term equity gains.
failure_condition: Returns are negative when production exceeds the 100 index threshold for consecutive months.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts reflect robust consumer confidence and credit availability, supporting broad economic activity and equity valuations over a quarter.
failure_condition: Housing starts decline while equity returns remain positive over a 60-day horizon.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation forces market pricing of aggressive monetary tightening, depressing equity valuations within a month.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive despite accelerating inflation exceeding the 0.5pp monthly threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in consumer credit balances and housing starts signals synchronized demand expansion, driving positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Equity returns are negative when both credit and housing expand simultaneously over a 20-day window.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll employment exceeding 145,000 monthly additions confirms sustained labor market strength, supporting corporate revenue growth and equity valuations over a quarter.
failure_condition: Equity returns decline when payrolls exceed the 145,000 threshold for consecutive months.
